description:
Creates single Plan Revision Log.

#### See - [Daily Log guide](https://developers.procore.com/documentation/daily-logs) - for additional info on
* Attachments

category.description: Category of discipline that appears on the revision

plan_number.description: Number that appears on the plan submitted

position.description: Order in which this entry was recorded for the day

updated_at.description: Timestamp of last update to Location

deleted_at.description: Timestamp when the segment was soft deleted

deleted.description: Indicates if the segment is deleted

attachments.description: Plan Revision Log Attachments are not viewable or used on web

400.description: Can not create due to errors

403.description: User does not have right permissions

category.description: Category of discipline that appears on the revision

date.description: Date of record. Format: YYYY-MM-DD Example: 2016-04-19

plan_number.description: Number that appears on the plan submitted

vendor_id.description: ID of the Vendor associated to the Plan Revision Log

location_id.description: The ID of the Location of the Plan Revision Log.

attachments.description:
Plan Revision Log Attachments are not viewable or used on web.
To upload attachments you must upload the entire payload as `multipart/form-data` content-type and
specify each parameter as form-data...

items.description: Look at Daily Log Guide for more info.
